headline: Instagram is finally letting everyone reorganize their profile grid
summary: Instagram is rolling out the ability for all users to rearrange their profile grid posts. This feature was announced nearly a year ago and was previously in test groups. It's now widely available on Android and iPhone mobile apps as of June 8th.

headline: Apple’s Screen Time updates are too little, too late
summary: Apple dedicated a significant portion of its WWDC keynote to parental controls. However, the updates largely consisted of a redesigned interface and minor upgrades to existing options. Critics suggest the new features are minimal and long overdue.

headline: 5 things I already love from the iOS 27 beta
summary: A reviewer explored the new iOS 27 developer beta on their iPhone 16 Pro shortly after its release. They were eager to try the new Siri AI but remained on Apple's waitlist. The article highlights other enjoyable features discovered during the beta test.

headline: Apple is using AI to fix Safari’s extension problem
summary: Apple is leveraging AI to address Safari's historical weakness in its extension library. Safari has long lacked robust extensions due to strict development requirements. Apple is now inviting users to 'vibe-code' their own extensions, as demonstrated in a demo.

headline: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Players Can Shape Its Story But the Trilogy Will Have a 'Singular Ending' for Everyone
summary: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation director Naoki Hamaguchi confirmed the remake trilogy will feature one 'singular ending.' Despite this, players will have significant freedom to shape Cloud's journey throughout the story. This approach balances player agency with a consistent narrative conclusion.

headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Ports Have Apparently Leaked
summary: Reports suggest that Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 may be ported to modern platforms. Information regarding these potential new releases has reportedly leaked. This news hints at classic Call of Duty titles making a return to current-gen consoles.

headline: Helldivers Movie Loses Jason Momoa as Its Star
summary: Jason Momoa has exited the live-action Helldivers movie. His departure leaves a significant role in the film adaptation vacant. The production will now need to find a new lead actor for the project.

headline: Halo: Campaign Evolved Collector's Edition Includes a Relic of a Bygone Gaming Era
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved is not just remaking a 25-year-old game, but also aiming to recreate its entire original era. The Collector's Edition includes a special 'relic of a bygone gaming era.' This edition offers a nostalgic experience beyond just the game's visuals.

headline: 'I was a prisoner in my home': Drug gangs 'cuckooing' hundreds of homes a week, police warn
summary: UK police warn that drug gangs are 'cuckooing' hundreds, possibly thousands, of homes weekly. 'Cuckooing' involves criminals taking over the homes of vulnerable individuals to deal drugs. Victims describe feeling like prisoners in their own residences due to this exploitation.

headline: Football regulator contacts West Ham over 'serious allegations' against Sullivan
summary: The football regulator has contacted West Ham United regarding serious allegations against co-owner David Sullivan. Multiple women accuse the billionaire of abusing his power and preying on them for sex. Some alleged incidents occurred when the women were in their late teens.

headline: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
summary: West Ham co-owner David Sullivan faces accusations of abusing his power to exploit women for sex. Women claim Sullivan told them they needed to have sex with him to feature in his newspapers. These are serious allegations of misconduct by a prominent public figure.

headline: Somali referee Artan barred from entering US ahead of World Cup
summary: Somali referee Omar Artan was denied entry into the United States. Consequently, he has been dropped from the list of officials for the upcoming World Cup. Artan was slated to be the first Somali to referee at the World Cup finals.
